cases.prompt: Design the identity foundation for a new Entra ID tenant.

expect.label: create two cloud-only break-glass accounts with FIDO2 hardware keys
govern app consent via the admin consent workflow

cases.prompt: Set up hybrid identity for our on-premises Active Directory in 2026 - Entra Connect or Cloud Sync?

expect.label: prefer Entra Cloud Sync for new builds
password hash sync as baseline sign-in

cases.prompt: Plan a rollout from passwords to passkeys for 5,000 users.

expect.label: manage via the Authentication methods policy, not legacy MFA policy
rollout order Authenticator then WHfB then FIDO2 passkeys
disable SMS as a primary MFA method
target > 90% of users on phishing-resistant methods
